<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Redis\Container\Json; use Predis\Command\Redis\Container\AbstractContainer; /** * @method array memory(string $key, string $path) * @method array help() */ class JSONDEBUG extends AbstractContainer { public function getContainerCommandId(): string { return 'JSONDEBUG'; } }
